Advanced static and dynamic AOI assignment
Scanpath and quality-control quick wins

Plots and visual diagnostics

Plot gallery

Representative gp3tools visual outputs built from safe synthetic demonstration data.

Expanded plot gallery
AOI sequence and reliability diagnostics

Lightweight statistical-extension examples for AOI entropy, scanpath-style sequence metrics, sequence distance, split-half reliability, and AOI timeline plots.

Statistical extensions and plots

Plot-first examples for the statistical, sequence, scanpath, and model-reporting extension layer.

Heatmaps and spatial visualisation

Advanced modelling and sensitivity

Model-readiness and sensitivity analysis
Bayesian planning workflow

Choose model families, check Bayesian readiness, extract pupil and scanpath features, and prepare external Bayesian analyses.

Experimental Bayesian bridge helpers

Optional workflows for brms, HDDM scripts, adaptive trial selection, HMM event classification, Gaussian-process pupil imputation, and CNN uncertainty filtering.

Metric extraction and model-boundary guidance

Extract eye-tracking and pupil metrics while keeping modelling and interpretation aligned with what the measures support.

Cluster-permutation time-course workflow
